'''Tedris Bjalin''' was an officer in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] who later defected to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Biography==
Bjalin was a classmate of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]], and later participated in the court-martial of Han, being given the special job of literally stripping him of all [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] decorations. He served as a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] on the [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] ''[[Imperial Destiny]]'', where he nearly captured Han who was attempting to escape after witnessing [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Winstel Greelanx]]'s execution by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. Instead, Han escaped, managing to stun Tedris and advised him to leave the Imperial Navy.

Bjalin would later take his former friend's advice. Shortly after the [[Battle on Mantooine/Legends|massacre]] on [[Mantooine/Legends|Mantooine]], Imperial ships on [[Tyshapahl]] ignited their engines, incinerating a large group of anti-Imperial protesters. His whole family, who were among the group, perished. Bjalin joined the [[Corellian Resistance/Legends|Corellian Resistance]], shortly before the formation of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and became a member of [[Red Hand Squadron]].

He rose through the ranks quickly, becoming a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] due to his Imperial training and took charge of the [[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|''Marauder''-class corvette]] [[Retribution (Marauder-class)|''Retribution'']]. Bjalin captained the Red Hand Squadron command ship just before their [[Capture of the Helot's Shackle|raid]] (led by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Bria Tharen]]) on the [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesian]] slave ship [[Emancipator (CR90 corvette)|''Helot's Shackle'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]''
